title: drs.control
description: drs-bridge -> drs-server control events. The consumer (drs-server ControlConsumer) ignores unrecognised event types, so this schema is intentionally OPEN: it pins the shape of known events without forbidding future ones. Every message MUST carry a string `event` discriminator.

precision_required_ms.description: Per-variant time-sync precision threshold in milliseconds.
